physics_matrix.cross_variable_reasoning: Node D-04 reported a temperature of 902.4°C with a pressure of 50.2 psi, yielding a ratio of 0.0427 psi/K, which violates Gay-Lussac's Law as high temperatures must correlate with high pressures. Node E-05 reported a pressure of 45.8 psi at a temperature of 855.1°C, yielding a ratio of 0.0536 psi/C, also violating Gay-Lussac's Law. Additionally, E-05 reported a viscosity of 0.0, violating the VISCOSITY POSITIVITY law.
